Sevavrat is a purpose-driven social organization creating meaningful change in underserved communities — through education, health, and women empowerment across India's urban slums.

Who We Are

A Movement Built on
Compassion & Service

Sevavrat works at the grassroots level to build a more inclusive and compassionate society. We address social challenges through community outreach, health awareness, educational support, and volunteer-driven initiatives that create both immediate relief and long-term impact.

We believe that service is not only about donations — it is about sharing time, skills, and compassion. Every individual, regardless of background, deserves the opportunity to live a healthy, educated, and dignified life.

Our Vision
"A society where every individual has the opportunity to live a healthy, educated, and dignified life."

"We don't just provide support — we build futures, one community at a time."

100%

Volunteer
Driven

Key Focus Areas

Programs That Transform Lives

Each initiative is designed with care, delivered with compassion, and built for lasting community impact.

Education for Children

We bring meaningful learning to children in urban slum areas where quality education is often out of reach. Through dedicated educational engagement and ongoing support, we help every child build a strong foundation for a better future.

Urban Slums Learning Support Child Development Literacy

Health & Wellness

We provide meaningful, continuous support through weekly counselling workshops and health awareness programs. Held every week without fail, these sessions ensure our communities receive ongoing guidance and preventive health care.

Weekly Workshops Counselling Women & Children Preventive Care

Women Empowerment

We believe every woman has the strength to build her own world. Our empowerment programs provide women with the confidence, skills, and opportunities they need to become independent and self-reliant.

Skill Building Confidence Independence Self-reliance
Our Approach

How We
Create Change

Four intentional steps that turn compassion into lasting community transformation.

01

Listen to Communities

We begin by truly understanding the needs of each community — meeting families, children, and women where they are, and listening before acting.

02

Mobilise Volunteers

Dedicated volunteers bring their skills, time, and heart to every program. Real service is about presence and commitment, not just donations.

03

Run Weekly Programs

Consistent weekly sessions and recurring outreach ensure communities receive sustained, reliable support — not just a one-time visit.

04

Measure Lasting Impact

We measure success by lives changed — children who learn, women who lead, and communities that grow stronger together over time.

Our Impact

Join The Movement

How You Can Help

Whether you give time, skills, or resources — every contribution creates a ripple of lasting change.

Volunteer Your Time

Join our weekly workshops, teach children, support counselling sessions, or help with community outreach. Your time is the most powerful gift you can give.

Volunteer Now

Donate & Support

Your financial support directly funds educational materials, health workshops, skill-building programs, and weekly counselling sessions for those who need it most.

Make a Donation

Share Your Skills

Are you a teacher, counsellor, doctor, or working professional? Share your expertise as a mentor and help children and women in our communities unlock their true potential.

Share Skills

Visitor Feedback

Voices from Our Community

★★★★★
2 months ago

Sevavrat Foundation is an excellent NGO running various social initiatives and helping those in need. They are very supportive, and I received great guidance while working on my project. I'm also glad to have the opportunity to create a website for them. Working with such a dedicated team has been a truly rewarding experience.

G
Google Reviewer
Verified Google Review
★★★★★
2 months ago

"Sevavrat Foundation is making a real difference in society. From helping needy families to supporting women and social causes, their work is truly meaningful. The team is sincere, hardworking and passionate about service. I strongly recommend everyone to support this foundation."

G
Google Reviewer
Verified Google Review
★★★★★
2 months ago

Sevavrat Foundation is about standing with people when they need it the most. The work done on the ground reaches real lives — children searching for education, elders needing care, and families facing medical struggles. Every effort creates visible change and restores dignity where it is often missing.

The team's consistent presence in the field shows genuine responsibility and compassion. Their actions reflect deep respect for people, not just processes or paperwork. What they build is not temporary relief, but steady support that helps individuals move forward with hope.

Your support here is not about giving money — it's about standing with people who need you. Even a small contribution can transform someone's life, bringing hope to a fellow human being.

G
Google Reviewer
Verified Google Review
★★★★★
5 months ago

Sevavrat Foundation is truly working at the ground level for elderly care, children's education, medical support, and women empowerment. The team works with honesty and pure intention, without any show-off or publicity.

If anyone wishes to donate, even a small contribution makes a big difference — One donation can help feed an elderly person, support a child's education, or save someone's life in a medical emergency.

I strongly encourage everyone to support Sevavrat Foundation's work. Your donation here is not charity — it is humanity. ❤

G
